  <defs>
    <marker id="m1" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z" fill="#1f6f78"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <style>
    .box{fill:#fff;stroke:#e3e1da;stroke-width:1.5}
    .hi{fill:#eef6f6;stroke:#1f6f78;stroke-width:1.5}
    .hot{fill:#fdf2e9;stroke:#b8531a;stroke-width:1.5}
    .t{font-family:sans-serif;font-size:15px;fill:#1a1a1a}
    .s{font-family:monospace;font-size:12px;fill:#555}
    .e{stroke:#1f6f78;stroke-width:2.2;marker-end:url(#m1)}
  </style>
  <rect x="25" y="58" width="145" height="82" rx="12" class="hi"/>
  <text x="98" y="88" text-anchor="middle" class="t">文本</text>
  <text x="98" y="115" text-anchor="middle" class="s">"北京 是 ..."</text>
  <rect x="210" y="58" width="155" height="82" rx="12" class="box"/>
  <text x="288" y="88" text-anchor="middle" class="t">Token ids</text>
  <text x="288" y="115" text-anchor="middle" class="s">[3109, 374, ...]</text>
  <rect x="405" y="45" width="155" height="108" rx="12" class="box"/>
  <text x="483" y="82" text-anchor="middle" class="t">Transformer</text>
  <text x="483" y="108" text-anchor="middle" class="s">fθ(context)</text>
  <text x="483" y="130" text-anchor="middle" class="s">最后一行 hidden</text>
  <rect x="600" y="58" width="95" height="82" rx="12" class="box"/>
  <text x="648" y="88" text-anchor="middle" class="t">Logits</text>
  <text x="648" y="115" text-anchor="middle" class="s">z ∈ R^|V|</text>
  <rect x="725" y="58" width="75" height="82" rx="12" class="hot"/>
  <text x="762" y="88" text-anchor="middle" class="t">采样</text>
  <text x="762" y="115" text-anchor="middle" class="s">next</text>
  <line x1="170" y1="99" x2="207" y2="99" class="e"/>
  <line x1="365" y1="99" x2="402" y2="99" class="e"/>
  <line x1="560" y1="99" x2="597" y2="99" class="e"/>
  <line x1="695" y1="99" x2="722" y2="99" class="e"/>
  <text x="410" y="205" text-anchor="middle" class="t" fill="#1f6f78">
    推理引擎的任务：把这个流水线尽可能正确、快速地跑起来
  </text>
</svg>`

  <text x="410" y="32" text-anchor="middle" class="txt">例句：The animal did not cross the street because it was tired</text>

    svg: `<svg width="820" height="300" viewBox="0 0 820 300" role="img" aria-label="attention as soft retrieval pipeline">
  <defs>
    <marker id="ap" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z" fill="#6b4fbb"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <style>
    .box{fill:#fff;stroke:#e3e1da;stroke-width:1.4}
    .txt{font-family:sans-serif;font-size:14px;fill:#1a1a1a}
    .sm{font-family:sans-serif;font-size:12px;fill:#555}
    .lab{font-family:sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#6b4fbb;font-weight:700}
    .mono{font-family:ui-monospace,Menlo,Consolas,monospace;font-size:13px;fill:#1a1a1a}
    .flow{stroke:#6b4fbb;marker-end:url(#ap);fill:none;stroke-width:1.6}
  </style>
  <text x="20" y="36" class="lab">三个角色</text>
  <g transform="translate(95,18)"><rect width="200" height="34" rx="9" class="box"/><text x="100" y="22" text-anchor="middle" class="sm">query q：想找什么</text></g>
  <g transform="translate(310,18)"><rect width="200" height="34" rx="9" class="box"/><text x="100" y="22" text-anchor="middle" class="sm">key kⱼ：能提供什么</text></g>
  <g transform="translate(525,18)"><rect width="200" height="34" rx="9" class="box"/><text x="100" y="22" text-anchor="middle" class="sm">value vⱼ：真正的内容</text></g>

  <g transform="translate(20,120)">
    <rect width="165" height="96" rx="10" class="box"/>
    <text x="82" y="28" text-anchor="middle" class="lab">① 打分</text>
    <text x="82" y="54" text-anchor="middle" class="mono">sⱼ = q · kⱼ / √d</text>
    <text x="82" y="78" text-anchor="middle" class="sm">点积越大越相似</text>
  </g>
  <path d="M185 168 L213 168" class="flow"/>
  <g transform="translate(215,120)">
    <rect width="165" height="96" rx="10" class="box"/>
    <text x="82" y="28" text-anchor="middle" class="lab">② 归一化</text>
    <text x="82" y="54" text-anchor="middle" class="mono">αⱼ = softmax(s)ⱼ</text>
    <text x="82" y="78" text-anchor="middle" class="sm">非负、求和为 1</text>
  </g>
  <path d="M380 168 L408 168" class="flow"/>
  <g transform="translate(410,120)">
    <rect width="165" height="96" rx="10" class="box"/>
    <text x="82" y="28" text-anchor="middle" class="lab">③ 读取</text>
    <text x="82" y="54" text-anchor="middle" class="mono">o = Σ αⱼ vⱼ</text>
    <text x="82" y="78" text-anchor="middle" class="sm">value 的加权平均</text>
  </g>
  <path d="M575 168 L603 168" class="flow"/>
  <g transform="translate(605,120)">
    <rect width="165" height="96" rx="10" class="box" fill="#f3eefc" stroke="#6b4fbb"/>
    <text x="82" y="40" text-anchor="middle" class="lab">输出 o</text>
    <text x="82" y="66" text-anchor="middle" class="sm">送回 residual stream</text>
  </g>

  <text x="410" y="262" text-anchor="middle" class="sm">权重 αⱼ 由数据学习得到，因此"该读谁"是模型自己决定的，而不是固定窗口</text>
</svg>`
